tools.name: ruff
tools.run_command: cd litellm && poetry run ruff check .
tools.fix_command: cd litellm && poetry run ruff check . --fix

tools.name: flake8
tools.scope: litellm/ directory (configured but not in CI)

linting.notes: Linting runs from litellm/ subdirectory, not repo root. MyPy validation failed due to missing proxy/enterprise directory reference. Black and Ruff validated successfully. Custom checks for circular imports and import safety also validated.

testing.mock_patterns: Uses pytest-mock, requests-mock, responses, respx for mocking. Conftest includes auto-reload of litellm module and event loop management.
testing.notes: Tests use parallel execution with pytest-xdist (-n 4). Conftest reloads litellm before each test to prevent callback chaining. Enterprise package setup is optional (cd enterprise && python -m pip install -e .) but directory may not exist. Tests validated successfully with 105 passing in test_utils.py.

gating_checks.name: LiteLLM Linting
gating_checks.command: cd litellm && poetry run black . && poetry run ruff check . && poetry run mypy . --ignore-missing-imports && poetry run python ../tests/documentation_tests/test_circular_imports.py && poetry run python -c 'from litellm import *'

ci.notes: CI uses Python 3.12. Linting workflow runs Black (formatting, not just checking), Ruff, MyPy, circular imports check, and import safety check. Test workflow pins openai==1.100.1 after poetry install. Enterprise package setup is attempted but may fail if directory missing.

build.notes: Poetry 1.8.0 is used. After poetry install, openai package is pinned to specific version (1.100.1 in CI). The project has optional extras: proxy, extra_proxy, utils, caching, semantic-router, mlflow.

conventions.notes: Conftest uses automatic litellm module reloading. Tests use pytest markers and fixtures. Code formatted with Black (line length and style from Black defaults).

lint_commands.notes: Found formatting issues in multiple files (expected behavior - linter working correctly)

lint_commands.command: cd litellm && poetry run ruff check .
lint_commands.notes: Passed with exit code 0, no issues found
Failed with 'can't read file proxy/enterprise: No such file or directory' - configuration issue
Passed, found expected litellm type hints usage

test_commands.command: poetry install --with dev,proxy-dev --extras 'proxy semantic-router' && poetry run pip install 'pytest-retry==1.6.3' pytest-xdist 'google-genai==1.22.0' 'fastapi-offline==1.7.3'

container_recipe.notes: Enterprise package setup (cd enterprise && python -m pip install -e .) fails as directory doesn't exist in this checkout - this is optional. MyPy has configuration issues but other linters work. Tests run successfully with pytest-xdist for parallel execution.

results.command: poetry install --with dev && pip install openai==1.100.1

results.notes: Full test file validated - all tests passing

validation.summary: Install OK, Black OK (found violations), Ruff OK, MyPy FAILED (config issue), circular imports OK, import safety OK, tests OK (105 passed)

gaps: MyPy type checking fails due to missing proxy/enterprise directory reference in configuration
Enterprise package directory doesn't exist in this checkout (optional dependency)
No coverage threshold configured or enforced
